title: Firecracker Micro-VM Lifecycle
description: Deconstruct the Firecracker micro-VM lifecycle, differentiating between the Init and Invoke phases. Analyze the impact of each lifecycle phase on serverless function cold-start performance and resource utilization.
objectives: Deconstruct the Firecracker micro-VM lifecycle, differentiating between the Init and Invoke phases.
Analyze the impact of each lifecycle phase on serverless function cold-start performance and resource utilization.
